info.title: Kang Open Banking API
info.description: This is a summary specification. The full dynamic OpenAPI specification with 250+ endpoints is available at the x-full-spec-url below. AI agents and tooling should fetch the full spec for complete coverage.

servers.description: Sandbox — use sandbox API keys obtained from the developer portal at https://kangopenbanking.com/developer/sandbox

post.summary: Create Charge (MoMo, Card, USSD, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal)
Pay POS Order (MoMo, Card, PayPal, Bank, Wallet)

200.description: RIB validation result with computed IBAN
Identifier validation with transfer rail recommendation

get.summary: Cameroon Bank Directory (15 banks with SWIFT/BIC codes)

200.description: Overdraft profile with eligibility, limits, risk band, and score factors
Recalculated overdraft profile with 7-factor score breakdown

202.description: Overdraft request submitted for manual approval

201.description: Webhook endpoint created with signing secret

post.description: Receives payment status updates from Flutterwave. Requires valid signature in verif-hash header.
Receives payment events from Stripe. Validates Stripe-Signature header.
Receives events from PayPal. Validates via PayPal verification API.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Health and status endpoints

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: OAuth 2.0, OIDC, DCR, PKCE

tags.name: AISP — Account Information
tags.description: Account information services (read-only)

tags.name: PISP — Payment Initiation
tags.description: Payment initiation services

tags.name: Payment Gateway
tags.description: Charges, payouts, refunds, disputes, settlements, payment links, subscriptions, split payments, tokenization, reconciliation

tags.name: Funding Intents
tags.description: Account funding lifecycle — MoMo, Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer with idempotent creation and webhook finalization

tags.name: Escrow & Treasury
tags.description: Escrow holds, treasury yield accounts

tags.name: Merchants
tags.description: Merchant registration, KYB, API keys, webhooks

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook endpoint management and delivery monitoring (24 event types)

tags.name: Loans
tags.description: Loan applications, approvals, disbursements, repayments

tags.name: Savings
tags.description: Savings products, accounts, deposits, withdrawals, interest

tags.name: Ledger
tags.description: Chart of accounts, journal entries, trial balance

tags.name: Virtual Cards
tags.description: Virtual card issuance, funding, transactions

tags.name: Mobile Money
tags.description: MTN and Orange Money charges and transfers

tags.name: Credit Scoring
tags.description: Credit profiles, scores (300-850), event-sourced credit history

tags.name: KYC & Compliance
tags.description: Identity verification, sanctions screening, CDD

tags.name: Standards & Directory
tags.description: IBAN/BIC/RIB validation, Cameroon bank directory, ISO 20022, SWIFT

tags.name: Banking Operations
tags.description: Internal transfers, facilitated transfers, exchange rates

tags.name: Certificates
tags.description: mTLS certificate management

tags.name: POS
tags.description: Point-of-sale commerce — catalog, inventory, orders, payments, refunds, QR payments, consumer marketplace, WooCommerce sync

tags.name: Consumer Tools
tags.description: Piggy Bank savings goals, Njangi group savings

tags.name: Identity
tags.description: Unified registration, login, MFA, session management — /v1/identity/*

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: KYB/KYC lifecycle, document upload, status tracking — /v1/onboarding/*

tags.name: Admin-Onboarding
tags.description: Admin review, approve/reject onboarding applications

mtls.description: mTLS client certificate authentication for FAPI 1.0 Advanced flows
